hero.title: AI‑Driven Mobile & SaaS Development
hero.subtitle: We help tech companies ship mobile apps, SaaS platforms, and AI solutions — from first scope to scaling to tens of thousands of users.
hero.mobileDesc: React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Expo, Capacitor.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: We focus on products where AI and mobility are core, not an afterthought.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: Native and cross‑platform apps with thoughtful onboarding, analytics, and retention.

items.title: SaaS Platforms
items.description: B2B and B2C SaaS with billing, roles, dashboards, and partner APIs.

items.title: AI Integrations
items.description: LLM integration, personal assistants, and generative flows in existing products.

items.title: E‑commerce Automation
items.description: Storefront automation, pricing, UGC, and marketing powered by AI.

about.subheadlineFallback: {{company}} is a small but experienced team of product managers, designers, and engineers who have worked with international startups and enterprise teams.
about.bullet1: · API‑first architecture for scale and integrations.
about.bullet2: · One design language across site, admin, and product.
about.bullet3: · Ready modules: auth, billing, admin, analytics.
about.bullet4: · Sprint‑based delivery with transparent demos and metrics.
